mapper.select: /* SQL ID : QstnDAO.qstnList 설 명 : 문항목록조회 */ SELECT QSTN.* , (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_LMS_CMMN_CD WHERE UP_CD = 'QSTN_RSPNS_TYCD' AND CD = QSTN.QSTN_RSPNS_TYCD) AS QSTN_RSPNS_TYNM FROM TB_LMS_QSTN QSTN WHERE QSTN.DELYN = 'N' AND QSTN.EXAM_DTL_ID = #{examDtlId} ORDER BY QSTN.QSTN_SEQNO, QSTN.QSTN_CNDDT_SEQNO
/* SQL ID : QstnDAO.qstnCntSelect 설 명 : 문항개수조회 */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_QSTN WHERE EXAM_DTL_ID = #{examDtlId} AND DELYN = 'N' AND QSTN_CNDDT_SEQNO = 1
mapper.update: /* SQL ID : QstnDAO.qstnSeqnoModify 설 명 : 문항순번수정 */ MERGE INTO TB_LMS_QSTN QSTN USING ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT EXAM_DTL_ID , QSTN_ID , QSTN_SEQNO , #{qstnSeqno} AS NEW_QSTN_SEQNO , #{searchKey} AS CURRENT_QSTN_SEQNO FROM TB_LMS_QSTN WHERE EXAM_DTL_ID = #{examDtlId} AND DELYN = 'N' ) A WHERE A.QSTN_SEQNO BETWEEN LEAST(A.NEW_QSTN_SEQNO, A.CURRENT_QSTN_SEQNO) AND GREATEST(A.NEW_QSTN_SEQNO, A.CURRENT_QSTN_SEQNO+1) ) OLD_QSTN ON ( QSTN.EXAM_DTL_ID = OLD_QSTN.EXAM_DTL_ID AND QSTN.QSTN_ID IN (OLD_QSTN.QSTN_ID) ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET QSTN.MDFR_ID = #{mdfrId} , QSTN.MOD_DTTM = FN_DTTM() , QSTN.QSTN_SEQNO = CASE WHEN QSTN.QSTN_SEQNO = OLD_QSTN.CURRENT_QSTN_SEQNO THEN OLD_QSTN.NEW_QSTN_SEQNO WHEN OLD_QSTN.NEW_QSTN_SEQNO < OLD_QSTN.QSTN_SEQNO THEN QSTN.QSTN_SEQNO + 1 ELSE QSTN.QSTN_SEQNO - 1 END

/* SQL ID : QstnDAO.qstnCnddtSeqnoModify 설 명 : 문항후보순번수정 */ MERGE INTO TB_LMS_QSTN QSTN USING ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT EXAM_DTL_ID , QSTN_ID , QSTN_SEQNO , QSTN_CNDDT_SEQNO , #{qstnCnddtSeqno} AS NEW_QSTN_CNDDT_SEQNO , (SELECT QSTN_CNDDT_SEQNO FROM TB_LMS_QSTN WHERE QSTN_ID = #{qstnId}) AS CURRENT_QSTN_CNDDT_SEQNO FROM TB_LMS_QSTN WHERE EXAM_DTL_ID = #{examDtlId} AND QSTN_SEQNO = #{qstnSeqno} AND DELYN = 'N' ) A WHERE A.QSTN_CNDDT_SEQNO BETWEEN LEAST(A.NEW_QSTN_CNDDT_SEQNO, A.CURRENT_QSTN_CNDDT_SEQNO) AND GREATEST(A.NEW_QSTN_CNDDT_SEQNO, A.CURRENT_QSTN_CNDDT_SEQNO + 1) ) OLD_QSTN ON ( QSTN.EXAM_DTL_ID = OLD_QSTN.EXAM_DTL_ID AND QSTN.QSTN_SEQNO = OLD_QSTN.QSTN_SEQNO AND QSTN.QSTN_ID IN (OLD_QSTN.QSTN_ID) ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET QSTN.MDFR_ID = #{mdfrId} , QSTN.MOD_DTTM = FN_DTTM() , QSTN.QSTN_CNDDT_SEQNO = CASE WHEN QSTN.QSTN_CNDDT_SEQNO = OLD_QSTN.CURRENT_QSTN_CNDDT_SEQNO THEN OLD_QSTN.NEW_QSTN_CNDDT_SEQNO WHEN OLD_QSTN.NEW_QSTN_CNDDT_SEQNO < OLD_QSTN.CURRENT_QSTN_CNDDT_SEQNO THEN QSTN.QSTN_CNDDT_SEQNO + 1 ELSE QSTN.QSTN_CNDDT_SEQNO - 1 END

/* SQL ID : QstnDAO.quizQstnScrBulkModify 설 명 : 퀴즈문항점수일괄수정 */ MERGE INTO TB_LMS_QSTN QSTN USING ( SELECT EXAM_DTL_ID , QSTN_ID , CASE WHEN QSTN_SEQNO = QSTN_CNT THEN 100 - (TRUNC(100 / QSTN_CNT, 2) * (QSTN_CNT - 1)) ELSE TRUNC(100 / QSTN_CNT, 2) END AS QSTN_SCR FROM ( SELECT EXAM_DTL_ID , QSTN_ID , QSTN_SEQNO , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_QSTN WHERE EXAM_DTL_ID = #{examDtlId} AND DELYN = 'N' AND QSTN_CNDDT_SEQNO = 1) AS QSTN_CNT FROM TB_LMS_QSTN WHERE EXAM_DTL_ID = #{examDtlId} AND DELYN = 'N' ORDER BY QSTN_SEQNO, QSTN_CNDDT_SEQNO ) A ) QSTN_SCR ON ( QSTN.EXAM_DTL_ID = QSTN_SCR.EXAM_DTL_ID AND QSTN.QSTN_ID = QSTN_SCR.QSTN_ID ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET QSTN.MDFR_ID = #{mdfrId} , QSTN.MOD_DTTM = FN_DTTM() , QSTN.QSTN_SCR = QSTN_SCR.QSTN_SCR
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : QbnkQstnDAO.profQstnCopyQuizQstnList 설 명 : 교수문항복사퀴즈문항목록조회 */ WITH SBJCT AS ( SELECT SBJCT_ID , SBJCT_YR , SBJCT_SMSTR FROM TB_LMS_SBJCT WHERE DELYN = 'N' AND USEYN = 'Y' ), QUIZ AS ( SELECT EXAM_BSC.SBJCT_ID , EXAM_DTL.EXAM_DTL_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC EXAM_BSC JOIN TB_LMS_EXAM_DTL EXAM_DTL ON EXAM_BSC.EXAM_BSC_ID = EXAM_DTL.EXAM_BSC_ID AND EXAM_DTL.USEYN = 'Y' AND EXAM_DTL.DELYN = 'N' WHERE EXAM_BSC.USEYN = 'Y' AND EXAM_BSC.DELYN = 'N' ) SELECT QSTN.QSTN_ID , (SELECT SBJCT_YR FROM SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = (SELECT SBJCT_ID FROM QUIZ WHERE EXAM_DTL_ID = QSTN.EXAM_DTL_ID)) AS SBJCT_YR , (SELECT SBJCT_SMSTR FROM SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = (SELECT SBJCT_ID FROM QUIZ WHERE EXAM_DTL_ID = QSTN.EXAM_DTL_ID)) AS SBJCT_SMSTR , (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_LMS_CMMN_CD WHERE UP_CD = 'QSTN_RSPNS_TYCD' AND CD = QSTN.QSTN_RSPNS_TYCD) AS QSTN_RSPNS_TYNM , QSTN.QSTN_SEQNO , QSTN.QSTN_CNDDT_SEQNO , QSTN.QSTN_TTL , (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_LMS_CMMN_CD WHERE UP_CD = 'QSTN_DFCTLV_TYCD' AND CD = QSTN.QSTN_DFCTLV_TYCD) AS QSTN_DFCTLV_TYNM FROM TB_LMS_QSTN QSTN WHERE QSTN.DELYN = 'N' AND QSTN.EXAM_DTL_ID = #{examDtlId} ORDER BY QSTN.QSTN_SEQNO, QSTN.QSTN_CNDDT_SEQNO
